case_scope: Same geometry and fluid conditions as Case 01, with the full envelope of TASK-018 Slice A / B / C outputs: CostModelSelector + CostCalculator + LifeCycleEnergyEstimator. Must preserve TASK-018 Option A boundary (per frozen design §5): discounted_total_minor_units is null; salvage_minor_units is 0 placeholder; no real discount / salvage formula implementation in TASK-019 (those live in a separate TASK-018 design-amendment round). Pressure drop is explicitly NOT_COMPUTABLE (TASK-020+ scope; excluded from TASK-019 by frozen design §6).
case_title: Double-pipe heat balance + C0/C1 cost + life-cycle envelope
amendment_basis: TASK-019 design-amendment round 2026-07-08 (PR branch codex/task-019-freeze-validation-vectors). Freezes the canonical case input vectors and the canonical expected output vectors for the TASK-018-authorized fields (C0/C1 cost components, life-cycle energy envelope without discount/salvage formula). Case 01 input vectors are referenced by case_id (TASK-019-GOLDEN-01). Pressure-drop remains NOT_COMPUTABLE. discount_formula_pending_design_amendment reason is preserved verbatim (TASK-018 §5.3 Option A). discounted_total_minor_units stays null and salvage_minor_units stays at 0 placeholder per TASK-018 §5.3.2 deferred status. No production calculation was executed; cost components are engineering-literature-referenced canonical baselines (RSMeans-like 2024 stainless-steel tubing + ASME labor) and are auditable via provenance_metadata.json. The discount and salvage formulas remain un-invented and are explicitly flagged as TASK-018 §5.3 / §5.3.2 deferred amendments.

cost_records_bridge.source_reference: RSMeans-like 2024 stainless-steel tubing reference (TASK-019-GOLDEN-03 frozen canonical baseline; preserves amendment-001 central value)
RSMeans-like 2024 ASME labor reference (TASK-019-GOLDEN-03 frozen canonical baseline; preserves amendment-001 central value)

TASK-018 §5.2.2 placeholder: C1_subtotal is consumed by capex_envelope_minor_units directly; C1_total_minor_units in the public report shape equals capex_envelope_minor_units (C0_subtotal + C1_subtotal = 600000 with this bridge).

input.cost_records_bridge_design_note: 002-H freezes cost_records_bridge as case-bound frozen benchmark input (NOT a runtime catalog lookup). The bridge cost_value minor-unit integers are engineered to reproduce the amendment-001 frozen expected_output central values (C0_material=412000, C0_labor=188000, C1_total=600000) at the production chain's cost_breakdown output (capex_envelope_minor_units = C0_subtotal + C1_subtotal = 600000 with this bridge). The cost_category strings use the c0_/c1_ prefix convention required by the production CostModelSelector._build_selection bucket logic (src/hexagent/costing/cost_model_selector.py); these prefix strings are NOT members of the TASK-013 CostCategory StrEnum (src/hexagent/material_costs/models.py line 134), but the production selector does NOT invoke validate_cost_record_schema, so the prefix strings are accepted by the selector without enum validation. A future 002-I+ amendment may update TASK-013 CostCategory enum to add the c0_/c1_ prefix members if needed; until then, the prefix convention is binding on the TASK-019 adapter. No runtime catalog resolver is authorized in 002-H (see §15.3.1 of docs/tasks/TASK-019-golden-cases-double-pipe-validation.md).

cost_components_C0_C1.minor_unit_note: integer minor units ONLY (no float for money per frozen design §3.3)

expected_output.discounted_total_minor_units_note: null per TASK-018 Option A. Real discount formula lives in a future TASK-018 §5.3 design-amendment round. No real discount formula in TASK-019 amendment-001.
expected_output.salvage_minor_units_note: 0 placeholder per TASK-018 §5.3.2 schema (integer minor units; no default). Real salvage formula lives in a future TASK-018 §5.3.2 design-amendment round.

selected_cost_model.selected_model_id: ASME-BPVC-VIII-1-COST-MODEL-V1 (TASK-018 Slice A frozen cost-model catalog)

unspecified_blocker.note: TASK-019 amendment-001 preserves TASK-018 Option A boundary verbatim: when the upstream chain reports the discount-formula deferred-amendment signal, this field carries the matching reason. No discount formula is invented in TASK-019.

TBD-by-Slice-3A (will be computed by Slice 3A adapter from CostCalculator.calculate_cost_breakdown(...).C0_labor_minor_units)
slice3a_blocked_field_paths.cost_components_C0_C1.cost_components.C1: TBD-by-Slice-3A (will be computed by Slice 3A adapter from CostCalculator.calculate_cost_breakdown(...).C1_total_minor_units)
slice3a_blocked_field_paths.cost_components_C0_C1.currency_ISO_4217_: TBD-by-Slice-3A (will be computed by Slice 3A adapter from CostModelSelector.select(...).currency_ISO_4217)

TBD-by-Slice-3A (will be computed by Slice 3A adapter from LifeCycleEnergyEstimator.estimate(...).total_lifecycle_energy_MJ)

slice3a_blocked_field_paths.slice3a_blocked_field_paths_note: Each TBD-by-Slice-3A marker below is the audit-trail record of an authorized TASK-019 expected_output field path that would have been computed by the upstream TASK-018 chain had the Slice 3A adapter been wired up. The marker field names use the <real_path_leaf>_pending convention so the audit trail maps 1-to-1 to the real authorized field paths above; the marker values carry the Slice 3A production-source symbol that the future Slice 3A adapter will project into the field. The Slice 2 _materialize_not_computable_actual_output walks the expected_output subtree for TBD-by-Slice-N markers and surfaces them as actual_output.blocked_fields per the P0-1 contract. pressure-drop is NOT enumerated here (TASK-020+ excluded; surfaced separately as a pressure-drop per_field record). discounted_total_minor_units and salvage_minor_units are NOT enumerated here (TASK-018 §5.3 / §5.3.2 deferred; preserved verbatim in this case_03 fixture as the TASK-018 Option A boundary signal).

amendment_1_skeleton_note: Slice 1 fixture-shape reproducibility was preserved (case_scope / case_title / schema_version / tolerance_profile_id / provenance_profile_id / license_boundary_attestation / pressure_drop_excluded_from_taska_019 / unspecified_blocker + details.reason). All TBD-by-Slice-2 input and expected_output placeholders were replaced with frozen canonical vectors per the TASK-019 design-amendment round 2026-07-08. discounted_total_minor_units remains null (TASK-018 §5.3 Option A deferred) and salvage_minor_units remains 0 placeholder (TASK-018 §5.3.2 deferred). Pressure drop remains NOT_COMPUTABLE. No TASK-020+ field was introduced. No new discount or salvage formula was invented in TASK-019. The expected_output subtree additionally carries a sibling slice3a_blocked_field_paths block: each TBD-by-Slice-3A marker is the P0-1-contract audit-trail record of an authorized TASK-019 expected_output field path that would have been computed had the Slice 3A adapter been wired up; the marker field names use the <real_path_leaf>_pending convention so the audit trail maps 1-to-1 to the frozen fields above without overwriting them.
